display.purpose: Brand wordmark only — 'Kasekor Helper'. Never used for content headings.

headline.purpose: Page section titles. One per viewport zone.

title.purpose: Component headings, table headers, sidebar labels.

body.purpose: Table content, form values, meta text. Max 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Form field labels, column headers, badge text. Always uppercase.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Login card and modals only. Signals 'this surface is above the application.'

shadows.name: inset-ring
shadows.purpose: Stat summary cells. Nearly just a 1px border — separates without lifting.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Navigation item hover, input border shift.

motion.name: duration-enter
motion.purpose: Page content entrance — opacity + small Y translate.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Deep Canopy fill, precise hover shift. Used for 'Register Batch' and other primary actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Register Batch <svg class="ds-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #0f3d1f; color: #fafaf8; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #165a2d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16a34a; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #0d3319; } .ds-btn-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input with uppercase label. Focus border shifts to Field Green. Used in batch registration form.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #666666; } .ds-field-input { background: #ffffff; border: 1.5px solid #e5e5e0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #333333; outline: none; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: #999999; } .ds-field-input:hover { border-color: rgba(22,163,74,0.6); } .ds-field-input:focus { border-color: #16a34a; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Sidebar nav items on Deep Canopy background. Active state: filled Field Green. Hover: Shadow Canopy.
components.html: DashboardAssetsSchedules
components.css: .ds-sidebar-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #a3b8aa; text-decoration: none; background: transparent; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1a4a2a; color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-active { background: #16a34a !important; color: #ffffff !important; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Status Badge: Healthy
components.description: Pill badge for batch status. Three variants: Healthy, At Risk, Harvesting.
components.html: HealthyAt RiskHarvesting
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid transparent; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-badge-healthy { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; border-color: #bbf7d0; } .ds-badge-risk { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; border-color: #fecaca; } .ds-badge-harvest { background: #fffbeb; color: #ca8a04; border-color: #fde68a; }

components.name: Stat Summary Cell
components.description: Individual metric cell in the stats row. Playfair value, label type heading, trend indicator. Inset Ring shadow.
components.html:
Total Assets

1,820

+12% from last month

Pending Alerts

3

requires attention
components.css: .ds-stat-row { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-stat-cell { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; background: #fafaf8; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.03), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); min-width: 140px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #666666; margin: 0; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111111; line-height: 1.2; margin: 4px 0 0; } .ds-stat-trend { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 2px 0 0; } .ds-trend-pos { color: #16a34a; } .ds-trend-neg { color: #dc2626; }

narrative.overview:
Kasekor Helper's visual language is the agronomist's field notebook: dense, legible, trusted. The interface is a working document, not a showpiece. Every element earns its space the way a measured entry earns its row — no decoration that isn't load-bearing, no whitespace that doesn't serve hierarchy.

The color strategy is committed: a deep forest-green sidebar occupies ~30% of the viewport at all times, anchoring the space with unmistakable brand weight. The content surface is warm parchment — the specific off-white of sun-dried field paper. Status signals are the only place where color carries semantic load; everywhere else it recedes.

This system explicitly rejects consumer agri-app aesthetics and generic SaaS dashboard templates.
keyCharacteristics: Deep canopy green anchors the navigation; warm parchment grounds the content area
Playfair Display for display and headings; DM Sans for all UI text
Status indicators are the only semantic color signal; all other color is structural
Flat content surface with structural depth reserved for modal/overlay contexts
Transitions are precise and brief; nothing draws attention to itself

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Color carries semantic meaning only in status indicators. Using green decoratively elsewhere dilutes the signal.

rules.name: The Weight Contrast Rule
rules.body: No middle ground between Playfair and DM Sans. No 500-weight middle. If something matters, it is headline-level (Playfair 700) or body/title (DM Sans).

rules.name: The Floor Rule
rules.body: Nothing in the content area floats above the surface except modals and the login card. If tempted to add a shadow, ask whether it belongs in the floor or above the application.

rules.name: The No-Stripe Rule
rules.body: Active navigation state is expressed through a filled background, not a left- or right-side border stripe.

dos: Do use Playfair Display 700/900 for headings and brand elements only
Do express active navigation state with a filled Field Green background across the full nav item width
Do use the three-part status badge system (background + text + border) for Healthy, At Risk, and Harvesting
Do let the sidebar carry the brand weight; keep the content area calm and neutral
Do use Inset Ring shadow on stat cells only; all other content-area elements are flat
Do maintain at least a 1.25x size ratio between adjacent type hierarchy levels
donts: Don't use cartoon farm illustrations, oversized emoji, or gamified progress indicators
Don't reach for blue or purple; the brand is anchored in forest green and warm neutrals
Don't use gradient text; headings and status labels use a single solid color
Don't use a border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on any element
Don't apply the Lift shadow to content-area components; it is reserved for login card and modals
Don't build identical icon-heading-text card grids
Don't use Sprout (#22c55e) in the content area as decoration
Don't write encouragement copy; state facts
